choices.text: Fatality within 8 hours; hospitalization, amputation, loss of eye within 24 hours. Phone 1-800-321-OSHA. Investigation begins; site secured; OSHA inspector may visit. Citations up to $156,259 for willful.

5 Whys (ask why 5 times to drill to root) + Fishbone diagram (cause/effect) + Bow-tie analysis (threats/barriers). Focus on systems not individuals. Common roots: inadequate training, poor planning, equipment failure, unsafe procedures, pressure to rush.
